_doc: [Karun 3 + Kes 3] Recipients for the pre-1:1 dashboard delivery. Per cadence directive, Ali + DRI both receive the same HTML 30 min before the meeting. TEST_MODE (env PILOT_DASH_TEST_MODE=1) suppresses delivery to the DRI so Ali can validate the full pipeline before going live. Set TEST_MODE=0 when Karun/Kes have confirmed they want the email.
